title: A Doctor Leaves Drum
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on a doctor leaves drum, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: A Doctor Leaves Drum. Chopper finally accepts the invitation to join Luffy, leaving Kureha and Drum Island with fear and hope mixed together. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It came from up by the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Is Wapol lighting fireworks or some- thing...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid, those were cannon shots!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Something big is about to happen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it! And it's the middle of the night too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I want everyone to watch out for incoming shells!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: After 30 years of research, this is the answer I came up with!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's like I'm seeing a dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee...it's impossible to understand how a fool thinks...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Damn it! I thought the lizard's eye would work for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Listen...! This red powder isn't any ordinary powder! If you shoot this into the atmosphere, it'll...

summary: This part highlights a doctor leaves drum and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
